createOrReplace.name: Ce La Vi
createOrReplace.excerpt: 39th-floor club and lounge atop Sathorn Square. Themed nights spanning house, hip-hop, and funk. Panoramic views south across the Chao Phraya basin.
createOrReplace.overview: Ce La Vi occupies the full top floor of Sathorn Square Tower in the Silom-Sathorn corridor. The venue splits into a restaurant, sky bar, and a club space that opens later in the evening. Weekday themes tend toward soul and hip-hop. Friday and Saturday nights pivot to house and dance music with resident and guest DJs. The crowd skews international and upscale. 39th-floor elevation means open-air sections carry wind and temperature shifts after dark.
createOrReplace.insiderTip: Wednesday Crush ladies night draws the most consistent midweek crowd with free-flow sparkling wine. For weekend nights, table reservations through Instagram are recommended. Arrive before 22:00 for the sky bar experience before the club takes over.
createOrReplace.address: 39th Floor, Sathorn Square Building, 98 North Sathorn Road, Silom, Bangrak, Bangkok 10500
createOrReplace.dressCode: Smart casual. Collared shirt, long trousers, closed-toe shoes for men.
